mechanism: The current fiscal deficit (~6.5% GDP) exceeds all six historical precedents of fiscal conditioning, which showed median ~3-year extensions. Combined with the Conundrum analogue's sequencing template (30 months accumulation → 12 months contained → 6 months discontinuous), this suggests the current regime may have an extended Phase 3 before resolution.
regime_dependence: Holds as long as fiscal deficits remain elevated and no exogenous forcing event occurs. Historical pattern required either recession or overwhelming central bank intervention for resolution.
